## Summary

## Safety Boundary

- [ ] No exploit modules.
- [ ] No credential testing.
- [ ] No brute force or default-password testing.
- [ ] No unauthorized login.
- [ ] No arbitrary shell command input.
- [ ] No automatic configuration changes.
- [ ] No cloud upload of audit evidence.

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run public:check`

## Privacy

- [ ] No secrets, customer data, personal paths, private screenshots, or real audit outputs.
- [ ] Data privacy impact is described.

## i18n

- [ ] Visible UI copy is localized or explicitly not user-facing.
- [ ] Raw Evidence remains preserved in its original form.
